description: Internet Store is a consumer service, powered by Updater, for checking internet and TV plan availability at a U.S. address and reserving a plan. Its public website and privacy policy describe end-user interactions, not developer-facing APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLIs.
summary: internetstore.com does not expose any documented public developer integration surfaces; available pages describe a consumer-facing Internet Store experience and mention only internal API actions to Updater servers within a ChatGPT-based service.
